description: Codex reflector — Antigravity (agy) native JSON hooks. GATED by the user setting `enable_json_hooks` (Antigravity does not fire JSON hooks unless it is enabled). REFLECTOR_HOST=antigravity is pinned on EVERY event so the host-discriminated /tmp fail-state file (codex-reflector-fails-antigravity-{session_id}.json) is written at PostToolUse and READ at Stop under the SAME namespace even when the Stop payload carries no workspacePaths to infer the host. PostToolUse output cannot inject on agy (returns {}); the surfacing point is Stop via decision:"continue"+reason. FIRING GATES (KTD-10): (a) hooks fire under `agy -p` with enable_json_hooks; (b) Stop decision:"continue"+reason re-injects reason as actionable feedback (UNCONFIRMED — if it fails, agy is advisory-only); (c) PreToolUse deny is UNVERIFIED, so no pre-edit block entry is shipped here.
